ATTY. STUART R. CURRAN OF SIMS, CURRAN & OCKEN, TEL. NO. 391-6182 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS AND JUDGMENT CREDITORS BRENDA OCHOA, EVE SEGASTURE, JENNER OCHOA AND MICHAEL CIOFALO'S Motion To Compel Compliance with court orders and for further discovery responses, for attorneys fee and for monetary sanctions against Defendants Erlinda San Juan and Fred San Juan and their counsel Stuart Curran and Brenda Cruz Keith is Off calendar as to the defendants and denied as to defendants' counsel. Due to the bankruptcy filings by defendants and the ensuing automatic stay, the court is without authority to hear the motion as to defendants. Even assuming that the bankruptcy stay does not extend to the requests for sanctions and contempt finding against defendants' counsel, because the asserted basis for such sanctions and contempt is defendants' alleged misconduct and defendant are now unable to dispute such asserted misconduct, the court exercises its discretion to deny those requests. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
